Anrich Nortje IPL Boost: Lucknow Deal Sparks Revival

Dec 17, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Anrich Nortje’s IPL Revival: Lucknow Super Giants Signing

Anrich Nortje’s IPL 2026 journey takes a pivotal turn as Lucknow Super Giants acquire him at his base price of ₹2 crore. The move offers continuity, familiar conditions, and an opportunity to regain rhythm and confidence ahead of a packed season.
